prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来全国报考热度持续较高，临床医学尤为突出。湖南师范大学在云南省医学类招生规模较小（2026年仅12人），专业设置以临床医学、预防医学、药学为主，均 为当前热门方向。云南省内优质医学教育资源相对有限，跨省报考湖南师范大学医学类专业的需求保持稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，2026年湖南师范大学在云南省医学类最低录取位次预计为22280名，较2025年（24566名）继续回升（更难进），主要受招生计划持续缩减影 响。波动区间为21780至22780名，建议考生在此区间内合理规划志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Hunan Normal University's medical enrollment in Yunnan Province: 2021 minimum rank 11196 (planned 8 students), 2022 rose to 8666 (planned reduced to 4), 2023 fell back to 10538 (planned 4). In 2024, medical enrollment significantly expanded to 16 students, with minimum rank sharply dropping to 41877; in 2025, planned reduced to 14 students, rank rebounded to 24566. In 2026, planned further reduced to 12 students (2 fewer than 2025, a reduction of about 14.3%), continued reduction will push the minimum rank to rise further (harder to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a key university under the 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Changsha City, Hunan Province. As a long-established comprehensive normal university, its Medical Department (Xianjiahu Campus) has good teaching resources and clinical training systems within Hunan Province. Although not a traditional strong medical school, it still holds certain appeal for Yunnan candidates due to its 211 platform and Double First-Class discipline construction.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have maintained high national application popularity in recent years, with clinical medicine being particularly prominent. Hunan Normal University's medical enrollment in Yunnan Province is relatively small (only 12 students in 2026), with majors mainly including clinical medicine, preventive medicine, and pharmacy, all of which are currently popular directions. High-quality medical education resources within Yunnan Province are relatively limited, so cross-provincial applications to Hunan Normal University's medical majors remain stable in demand.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the minimum admission rank for Hunan Normal University's medical category in Yunnan Province in 2026 is predicted to be 22280, continuing to rise (harder to enter) compared to 2025 (24566), mainly due to the ongoing reduction in enrollment plans. The fluctuation range is 21780 to 22780. It is recommended that candidates plan their applications reasonably within this range.
